m5stack_ir_init.tooltip: Automatically select the onboard infrared emission pin according to the official definition of the current development board

m5stack_ir_send.message0: Onboard infrared transmission %1 Address %2 Command %3 Repeat %4 times
m5stack_ir_send.tooltip: Send selected protocol via Arduino-IRremote; supports 23 address/command protocols

m5stack_ir_send_repeat_frame.message0: Onboard infrared transmission %1 dedicated repeating frame
m5stack_ir_send_repeat_frame.tooltip: Send short repeated frames specified by the protocol, suitable for simulating a long press of a remote control button

m5stack_ir_send_pronto.message0: Onboard infrared transmission Pronto code %1 repeated %2 times
m5stack_ir_send_pronto.tooltip: Sends a Pronto Hex string and returns whether the input is valid

m5stack_ir_send_raw.message0: Onboard infrared transmits original waveform %1 carrier wave %2 kHz
m5stack_ir_send_raw.tooltip: Send microsecond durations separated by commas, semicolons, or whitespace, up to 256 items

m5stack_ir_send_raw_repeat.message0: Onboard infrared repeats sending original waveform %1 carrier %2 kHz period %3 ms repeats %4 times
m5stack_ir_send_raw_repeat.tooltip: Send the original waveform repeatedly according to the specified frame period, and return whether the parsing and sending are successful.

m5stack_ir_send_pulse_distance.message0: Onboard infrared transmission custom pulse protocol carrier %1 kHz frame header mark %2 space %3 logic 1 mark %4 space %5 logic 0 mark %6 space %7 data %8 bits %9 bit sequence %10 frame period %11 ms repeat %12 times
m5stack_ir_send_pulse_distance.tooltip: Send pulse distance or pulse width protocol with custom mark/space parameters

m5stack_ir_send_biphase.message0: Onboard infrared transmission bi-phase encoding carrier %1 kHz time unit %2 us data %3 digits %4 including start bit %5
m5stack_ir_send_biphase.tooltip: Send bi-phase encoded data used by RC5/RC6 type protocols according to the specified carrier
